message.content:
@startuml
title SDP Initiated Request/Response Pattern with Correlation ID

skinparam sequence {
  backgroundColor #F5F5DC
  actorBorderColor #000000
  actorBackgroundColor #FFA500
  actorFontColor #000000
  lifelineBorderColor #000000
  lifelineBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
  lifelineFontColor #000000
  messageFontColor #000000
  messageFontName "Arial"
  messageFontSize 12
  noteFontColor #000000
  noteFontName "Arial"
  noteFontSize 12
}

participant "SERVER NODE 1" as SN1
participant "SERVER NODE 2" as SN2
participant "STATE CACHE" as SC
participant "BROKER" as BR
participant "APP" as APP

SN1 -> SN1 : new request/response interaction
activate SN1
SN1 -> SN1 : create interaction context
deactivate SN1

SN1 -> SC : newMessageID = nextMessageID()
activate SN1
SN1 -> SC : put(newMessageID, interaction context)
deactivate SN1

SN1 -> SN1 : create message
activate SN1
SN1 -> SN1 : message.messageID = newMessageID
deactivate SN1

SN1 -> BR : publish message
activate SN1
deactivate SN1

BR -> APP : read message
activate BR
activate APP
APP -> APP : create response
deactivate APP
APP -> APP : response.correlationID = message.messageID
deactivate APP

APP -> BR : publish response
activate APP
deactivate APP

BR -> SN2 : read response
activate BR
activate SN2
SN2 -> SC : interaction context = get(response.correlationID)
deactivate SN2
SN2 -> SN2 : process response
deactivate SN2
SN2 -> SC : delete(response.correlationID)
deactivate SN2

deactivate BR

@enduml
